creator: markand@malikania.fr
text:
On 03/01/2014 14:46, Bernhard Fröhlich wrote:
> Thanks for the report! The patch was committed to our virtualbox
> development repository and will be committed to the FreeBSD
> portstree soon.
>
> https://redports.org/changeset/21292/virtualbox
>

Hi,

I'm very happy to see that you maintain the virtualbox-ose FreeBSD port
upstream :-). All my best for the new year.

Cheers,
David Demelier
